PENDANT-BRIDGE.settings.enabled.name: Enable bridge
PENDANT-BRIDGE.settings.enabled.hint: Connect this client to pendant-home. Normally only the GM should enable this.
PENDANT-BRIDGE.settings.url.name: Relay URL
PENDANT-BRIDGE.settings.url.hint: WebSocket URL of pendant-home's Foundry Bridge relay. Default: ws://localhost:30001
PENDANT-BRIDGE.settings.token.name: Auth token
PENDANT-BRIDGE.settings.token.hint: Auth token shown in pendant-home's Foundry Bridge module.
PENDANT-BRIDGE.settings.gmOnly.name: GM only
PENDANT-BRIDGE.settings.gmOnly.hint: If on, the bridge only attempts to connect when the current user is a GM.
